title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN ANTONIO BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTO TOMAS, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO EUSTACIO MALOLES, SR. MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 11857 / 62 OG No. 46, 8611 (November 14, 1966)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 4492, June 19, 1965 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF SAN ANTONIO BARRIO SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF SANTO TOMAS, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO EUSTACIO MALOLES, SR. MEMORIAL SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of San Antonio Barrio School in the Municipality of Santo Tomas, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Eustacio Maloles, Sr. Memorial School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 19, 1965.
